name: ai4ss-skills
description: Research skills for empirical social science, centered on political-science judgment, evidence, analysis, and revision.

interface.longDescription: Support the substantive work of empirical political science: formulating questions, reading literatures, developing designs, finding and constructing data, analyzing evidence, reviewing methods, writing, revising, and presenting research.
defaultPrompt: Develop this political-science topic into a consequential and empirically tractable research problem.
Review current Chinese- and English-language scholarship and reconsider this study in light of it.
Assess this empirical design and analysis, then revise its claims to match the evidence.
